creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sun Jan 13 20:42:19 2013
New Revision: 310332
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310332

Log:
  - Update to 0.9.7
  - Use the abbrev. name in MASTER_SITES
  - Give maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/175203
  Submitted by:	Po-Chien Lin <linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw>
  Approved by:	Georg Graf <georg@graf.priv.at> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/mail/py-milter/Makefile
  head/mail/py-milter/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/mail/py-milter/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/py-milter/Makefile	Sun Jan 13 20:40:33 2013	(r310331)
+++ head/mail/py-milter/Makefile	Sun Jan 13 20:42:19 2013	(r310332)
@@ -1,19 +1,15 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:    py-milter
-# Date created:         26 april 2002
-# Whom:                 Vsevolod Lobko <seva@sevasoft.kiev.ua>
-#
+# Created by: Vsevolod Lobko <seva@sevasoft.kiev.ua>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	milter
-PORTVERSION=	0.9.5
+PORTVERSION=	0.9.7
 CATEGORIES=	mail python
-MASTER_SITES=	SOURCEFORGE
+MASTER_SITES=	SF
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PYPORTNAME}/${PYPORTNAME}/${DISTNAME}
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 DISTNAME=	${PYPORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	georg@graf.priv.at
+MAINTAINER=	linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw
 COMMENT=	Python interface to Sendmail milter API
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2

Modified: head/mail/py-milter/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/py-milter/distinfo	Sun Jan 13 20:40:33 2013	(r310331)
+++ head/mail/py-milter/distinfo	Sun Jan 13 20:42:19 2013	(r310332)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (python/pymilter-0.9.5.tar.gz) = 7bb478a4f9512e1dfe77c658f0410d62d9af91cedc35ee7aaaff6bc9a56d7f85
-SIZE (python/pymilter-0.9.5.tar.gz) = 117786
+SHA256 (python/pymilter-0.9.7.tar.gz) = 4fa5ae49de545785c84d427b1bf5b5985547febcdbc9fe205b987a7b459b45f3
+SIZE (python/pymilter-0.9.7.tar.gz) = 119829
